phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Our Lady of Snow chapel is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a capela de Nossa Senhora da Neve?
phrases.pronunciation: POH-djee een-jee-KAR ah kah-PEH-lah djee-NOH-sah seh-NYOH-rah dah NEH-vee?
phrases.cultural_note: Elevated chapel offering views over the medieval town.

likely_response.local: Pergunte na bilheteira dos Muralhas, ao lado do Portão.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DOOSH moo-RAH-lyuhsh, OW LAH-doo DOO poo-ruh-TOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the Wall ticket kiosk, next to the gate.

responses.english: Ask at the Wall ticket kiosk, next to the gate.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DOOSH moo-RAH-lyuhsh, OW LAH-doo DOO poo-ruh-TOWN.
responses.french: Pergunte na bilheteira dos Muralhas, ao lado do Portão.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the tourist info desk is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o posto de informações turísticas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHN-jee FEE-kah oo POHS-too jee een-for-mah-SOWN-jees too-REES-tee-kahs?
phrases.cultural_note: The tourist info desk is a nearby service, not inside the gate.

likely_response.local: O posto de informações turísticas fica perto da entrada.
likely_response.pronunciation: AW POHSH-too DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH too-REESH-tee-kuhsh FEE-kuh PEHR-too DUH ayngt-RAH-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: The tourist information desk is near the entrance.

responses.english: The tourist information desk is near the entrance.
responses.phonetic: AW POHSH-too DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH too-REESH-tee-kuhsh FEE-kuh PEHR-too DUH ayngt-RAH-duh.
responses.french: O posto de informações turísticas fica perto da entrada.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar o quiosque de bilhetes para as muralhas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AW KEEOHSH-kih DIH bee-LYEH-tihsh PUH-ruh UHSH moo-RAH-lyuhsh?

likely_response.local: O quiosque de bilhetes para as muralhas fica do lado de fora. Pode comprar os bilhetes com o funcionário da bilheteira.
likely_response.pronunciation: AW KEEOHSH-kih DIH bee-LYEH-tihsh PUH-ruh UHSH moo-RAH-lyuhsh FEE-kuh DOO LAH-doo DIH FAW-ruh. PAW-dih koomp-RAHR OOSH bee-LYEH-tihsh KOHM AW foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo DUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: The ticket kiosk for the walls is outside. You can buy tickets from the ticket booth attendant.

responses.english: The ticket kiosk for the walls is outside. You can buy tickets from the ticket booth attendant.
responses.phonetic: AW KEEOHSH-kih DIH bee-LYEH-tihsh PUH-ruh UHSH moo-RAH-lyuhsh FEE-kuh DOO LAH-doo DIH FAW-ruh. PAW-dih koomp-RAHR OOSH bee-LYEH-tihsh KOHM AW foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo DUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
responses.french: O quiosque de bilhetes para as muralhas fica do lado de fora. Pode comprar os bilhetes com o funcionário da bilheteira.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the souvenir shop inside is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a loja de recordações?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH LAW-zhuh DIH rih-koo-ruh-duh-SOHNYSH?
phrases.cultural_note: Small shop sells local crafts and regional ginjinha.

likely_response.local: A loja de recordações fica dentro do arco.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH LAW-zhuh DIH rih-koo-ruh-duh-SOHNYSH FEE-kuh DAYNGT-roo DOO AH-ruh-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: The souvenir shop is inside the arch.

responses.english: The souvenir shop is inside the arch.
responses.phonetic: AH LAW-zhuh DIH rih-koo-ruh-duh-SOHNYSH FEE-kuh DAYNGT-roo DOO AH-ruh-koo.
responses.french: A loja de recordações fica dentro do arco.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the statue of Nossa Senhora da Neve is
phrases.text_local: Onde está a estátua de Nossa Senhora da Neve?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee es-TAH ah es-TAH-too-ah jee NO-sah se-NYO-rah dah NE-vee? (está a links: es-TAH-nah)
phrases.cultural_note: Stone devotional statue flanking the Manueline entrance.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, encontra-se junto ao portal.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ayng-KOHNGT-ruh-SIH ZHOONNG-too OW poo-ruh-TAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's located next to the portal.

responses.english: Good morning, it's located next to the portal.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ayng-KOHNGT-ruh-SIH ZHOONNG-too OW poo-ruh-TAHL.
responses.french: Bom dia, encontra-se junto ao portal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Capela de Nossa Senhora da Neve is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Capela de Nossa Senhora da Neve?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH kuh-PEH-luh DIH NAW-suh seh-NYOH-ruh DUH NEH-vih?
phrases.cultural_note: Historic chapel integrated into the defensive gate structure.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica no interior do arco.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh NOO een-tih-REEOHR DOO AH-ruh-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's inside the arch.

responses.english: Good morning, it's inside the arch.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh NOO een-tih-REEOHR DOO AH-ruh-koo.
responses.french: Bom dia, fica no interior do arco.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar uma loja de souvenirs?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR OO-muh LAW-zhuh DIH soow-vih-NEE-ruhsh?

likely_response.local: A loja de souvenirs fica dentro do arco da Porta da Vila.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH LAW-zhuh DIH soow-vih-NEE-ruhsh FEE-kuh DAYNGT-roo DOO AH-ruh-koo DUH PAW-ruh-tuh DUH VEE-luh.
likely_response.translation_en: The souvenir shop is inside the arch of Porta da Vila.

responses.english: The souvenir shop is inside the arch of Porta da Vila.
responses.phonetic: AH LAW-zhuh DIH soow-vih-NEE-ruhsh FEE-kuh DAYNGT-roo DOO AH-ruh-koo DUH PAW-ruh-tuh DUH VEE-luh.
responses.french: A loja de souvenirs fica dentro do arco da Porta da Vila.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Our Lady of Snow chapel is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Capela de Nossa Senhora da Neve?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH kuh-PEH-luh DIH NAW-suh seh-NYOH-ruh DUH NEH-vih?
phrases.cultural_note: The chapel is tucked inside the gate passage on the right side.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Capela de Nossa Senhora da Neve.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH kuh-PEH-luh DIH NAW-suh seh-NYOH-ruh DUH NEH-vih.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Chapel of Our Lady of Snow.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Chapel of Our Lady of Snow.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH kuh-PEH-luh DIH NAW-suh seh-NYOH-ruh DUH NEH-vih.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Capela de Nossa Senhora da Neve.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Our Lady of Snow statue is
phrases.text_local: Onde localizo a imagem de Nossa Senhora da Neve?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih loo-kuh-LEE-zoo AH ee-MAH-zhayng DIH NAW-suh seh-NYOH-ruh DUH NEH-vih?
phrases.cultural_note: Sacred marker denoting the historic town entrance.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, observa-se no vão do arco.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, awb-SEH-ruh-vuh-SIH NOO VOWN DOO AH-ruh-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's visible in the archway.

responses.english: Good morning, it's visible in the archway.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, awb-SEH-ruh-vuh-SIH NOO VOWN DOO AH-ruh-koo.
responses.french: Bom dia, observa-se no vão do arco.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the wall ticket kiosk is
phrases.text_local: Onde vendo bilhetes para as muralhas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih VAYNG-doo bee-LYEH-tihsh PUH-ruh UHSH moo-RAH-lyuhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: The ticket kiosk for the walls is just outside the gate, not inside.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, o quiosque fica do lado de fora.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, AW KEEOHSH-kih FEE-kuh DOO LAH-doo DIH FAW-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, the kiosk is outside.

responses.english: Good morning, the kiosk is outside.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, AW KEEOHSH-kih FEE-kuh DOO LAH-doo DIH FAW-ruh.
responses.french: Bom dia, o quiosque fica do lado de fora.
